zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald於1363年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱時，她的父親John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles43歲，母親Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland27歲。她於1381年與Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1413年3月9日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald于1363年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱时，她的父亲John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles43岁，母亲Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland27岁。她于1381年与Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1413年3月9日在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

nameMeanings.name: Macdonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

nameMeanings.name: Isles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire) and Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): variant of   Iles   (see   Lyle  ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald was born in 1363, in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, was 43 and her mother, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, was 27. She married Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan in 1381, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 9 March 1413, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald est née en 1363, à Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan en 1381, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1413, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald 1363 in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles 43 und ihre Mutter Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland 27. Sie hat 1381 in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. März 1413 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald è nata il nel 1363 nel Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan nel 1381, nel Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 marzo 1413, nel Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonaldが1363年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアイスル オフ スクイで生まれた時，父John Carrach MacDonald of the Islesは43歳，母Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotlandは27歳であった。1381年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンでSir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1413年3月9日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンで50歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald(이)가 1363년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 이슬일 프 스카이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1381년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1413년 3월 9일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald nasceu em 1363, em Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan em 1381, em Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1413, em Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald родилась в 1363 г. в местности исл оф ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan в 1381 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 9 марта 1413 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald nació en 1363, en Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan en 1381, en Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1413, en Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.
